title: Hermes Skill Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating Hermes skill YAML frontmatter in SKILL.md files

name.description: Unique skill identifier. Lowercase, hyphens/underscores only.

description.description: One-sentence description of what the skill does.

triggers.description: List of trigger conditions for this skill.

scheduled.description: Cron expression. Must be valid 5-field cron. May contain a trailing parenthetical note (e.g. '0 6,18 * * * (note)').

manual.description: Keyword that triggers this skill manually.

oneOf.description: Plain string as shorthand for a manual trigger.

required_environment_variables.description: Environment variables that must be set for this skill to function.

required_commands.description: CLI commands that must be available in PATH.

missing_required_environment_variables.description: Environment variables detected as missing at load time.

missing_credential_files.description: Credential files detected as missing at load time.

missing_required_commands.description: Commands detected as missing at load time.

setup_needed.description: Whether setup steps are required before the skill is operational.

setup_skipped.description: Whether setup has been intentionally skipped.

readiness_status.description: Current operational readiness of the skill.

homepage.description: URL to the skill or project homepage.

local_path.description: Local filesystem path relevant to this skill.

git_remote.description: Git remote URL for the project.

related_skills.description: Skills related to or dependent on this skill.

additionalProperties.description: Additional top-level fields (skills, related_skills, etc.) are allowed.
